hooks.command: bash -c 'AGENT_DIR=".claude-code-hermit"; rm -f "$AGENT_DIR/sessions/.eval-hash"; echo "---Session Context---"; [ -f "$AGENT_DIR/OPERATOR.md" ] && head -50 "$AGENT_DIR/OPERATOR.md"; echo "---Active Session---"; [ -f "$AGENT_DIR/sessions/SHELL.md" ] && cat "$AGENT_DIR/sessions/SHELL.md" || echo "No active session"; echo "---Last Report---"; ls -t "$AGENT_DIR"/sessions/S-*-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs cat 2>/dev/null || echo "No previous sessions"; bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-upgrade.sh" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"'

Stop.description: Track token and cost metrics per session
Suggest compaction when context is filling up
Auto-populate changed files in SHELL.md from git diff
Evaluate session quality (task status, plan tracked, blockers documented)
